title: Peter Parker (Earth-90214)
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Peter Parker}} {{Youmay|the [[Earth-90214|E-90214]] version of Peter|the [[Peter Parker|other versions]], or the [[Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse|movie]]}} {{CharacterTabber}} {{Character |name = Spider-Man |image = SPDRMN-ITSV-Noir-Peter-Parkerl.jpg|Peter Parker Screenshot_2023-04-26_7.11.04_PM.png|Spider-Man |alias = '''Codenames'''

|counterpart = * [[Peter Parker]] * [[Spider-People|Spider-Man]] |universe = [[Earth-90214]] |status = Alive |relatives = * [[Benjamin Parker (Earth-90214)|Benjamin Parker]] (uncle, deceased) |affiliation = *[[Spider-Gang]] |occupation = Private investigator |species = Human (enhanced) |gender = Male |appearances = *''[[Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse]]'' *''[[Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse]]'' |actor = |fullname = Peter Benjamin Parker |skin color=White (Fair)|eyes=Black|hair=Black|citizenship={{Citizenship|USA}}|marital Status=Single|voice actor=[[Nicolas Cage]]|identity=Secret|age=18+, most likely in his 20s}} {{Quote|Wherever I go, the wind follows. And the wind... smells like rain.|[[Peter_Parker_(Earth-90214)|Spider-Man]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} '''Peter Benjamin Parker''' was bitten by a [[Radioactive spider|radiactive spider]], becoming the feared vigilante of [[Earth-90214|New York City]] known as the '''Spider-Man'''. Some time later, he was pulled out of his dimension by [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Kingpin's]] [[Super-Collider]] and into [[Earth-1610|another universe]], where he teamed up with his variants and the new Spider-Man of that reality, [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales]]. They managed to stop Kingpin before he caused irreparable damage to the [[Multiverse]]. Peter and his other counterparts then returned to their home universes and continued their lives. A year later, Peter was recruited by [[Gwen Stacy (Earth-65)|Gwen Stacy]] to rejoin the [[Spider-Gang]] with their old teammates and new ones to rescue Miles after he was mistakenly teleported to [[Earth-42]]. ==Biography== === Early Life === ==== Life as Spider-Man ==== Peter Parker lived in 1930s during the days of the Great Depression, the orphan Peter would grow up with the care of his beloved Aunt May and [[Ben Parker|Uncle]] [[Benjamin Parker (Earth-90214)|Ben]], a veteran of [https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_I World War I]. The latter would die sometime later. One day, Peter was bitten by a magical spider giving him super-strength, durability, and the ability to stick to flat surfaces. Peter decided to use his abilities to end the violence and the injustice of his city becoming the vigilante known as Spider-Man. He would also work as a private eye while he fights Nazis and other menaces. ===[[Collider Crisis]]=== ==== Arriving to another universe ==== During one of his adventures, Peter was pulled into an alternate universe, deciding, along with [[Peni Parker|Peni]] and [[Peter Porker|Peter]], to search help through this universe's Aunt May's house. ==== Meeting more Spider-People ==== Upon meeting and finding out that [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)||Miles Morales]] would be the one to destroy the [[Super-Collider]] once they leave, Peter was among those who grilled the boy, questioning his ability to do so, which caused Miles to leave out of frustration and pressure. He waited alongside the other Spider-People for Miles to return and for Peni to finish making the [[goober]]. ==== [[Duel at Aunt May's House|Duel At Aunt May's House]] ==== Once Peni finished with the goober, Miles returned in a panicked state, having found out [[Aaron Davis (Earth-1610)|his uncle]] was The Prowler. Peter commented that this was 'a pretty hardcore origin story' before [[Olivia Octavius|Doc Ock]] crashed through the door. Peter would participate in the following fight against [[Lonnie Lincoln (Earth-1610)|Tombstone]], [[Maximus Gargan (Earth-1610)|Scorpion]] and Doc Ock. Once the battle was over, Peter along with the other spiders tracked Miles down to his dorm room to comfort Miles over Aaron's death. Peter mentioned that his own uncle Benjamin had been killed as well. He then waited outside as Peter B told Miles he was not coming to the Collider before leaving with the others. ==== [[Fight at the Collider]] ==== After arriving at [[Fisk Tower]] and witnessing the party inside held in honor of the late [[Peter Parker (Earth-1610)|Peter Parker]] (the original Spider-Man of Earth-1610), Peter would be the one to point out the waiters dressed as Spider-Man. He, Gwen and Peter B would disguise as waiters to sneak past security. They travelled to the Super-Collider using the private elevator. Just as they were about to go home, they were attacked by Doc Ock, Tombstone, Scorpion and an army of goons, although they were saved by a refreshed and ready Miles, who had finally mastered his powers. Peter would go on to defeat Tombstone and would help Peni and Peter defeat Scorpion. He would then watch as Peni retrieved the spider from the destroyed [[SP//dr robot|Sp//dr]] suit and asked if she was okay before carrying her to the top of the Collider. He was the second to leave after Peni, telling the group he loved them all before leaving. Peter brought home with him a Rubik's cube and, despite not knowing the names of the colors, eventually completed it.''[[Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse]]'' === [[Spider War|Spider-Wars]] === ==== Rescuing Miles ==== Over a year later, Peter was recruited by Gwen into a reorganized Spider-Gang to rescue Miles from [[Earth-42]] and save his father from Spot. After picking up Peter B. and his daughter [[Mayday Parker (Earth-616)|Mayday Parker]], Peter and his teammates assembled on Peter B.'s roof. There, they swung through a portal to Earth-42 to save their friend.''[[Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse]]'' ==Personality== {{Biography Quote|Can you close off your feelings so you don't get crippled by the moral ambiguity of your violent actions?|Peter projecting onto [[Miles Morales|Miles]]|Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse}} Peter's life is dark, both literally and figuratively. He copes with his violent way of life by closing himself off from emotions, and on the rare occasion that he wants to feel, he would do it by letting a match burn up to his fingertips. Meeting the [[Spider-Gang]] helped bring color to his life. He showed empathy towards his new friends on more than one occasion and even told his new friends that he loved them before they parted ways. ==Powers & Abilities== === Powers === * '''Spider physiology''': Having been bitten by a [[Radioactive Spider|magical spider]], Peter possesses the enhanced strength, speed, agility, spider-sense, and the ability to climb walls. ** '''Superhuman strength''': Peter possesses the proportionate strength of a spider, allowing him to face foes in combat that would otherwise overwhelm him. His physical strength also extends into his legs, enabling him to be able to jump great distances and heights. ** '''Superhuman speed''': Peter possesses the proportionate speed of a spider, allowing him to move at speeds that are beyond the natural physical limits of human athletes. He is also able to traverse great distances while running and web-swinging. ** '''Superhuman agility''': Peter possesses enhanced agility that are far beyond the natural physical limits of humans. ** '''Superhuman durability''': Peter's body is far tougher and denser than a regular human as he could withstand falls from extreme heights, blunt force trauma and superhuman blows with little damage. Peter even survived and recovered from getting his back broken, something that might otherwise paralyze ordinary humans. **'''Wall-crawling''': Peter possesses the ability to cling onto any surface using just his fingertips and feet. **'''Spider-Sense''': When danger is imminent, Peter experiences a buzzing sensation in his head as a sort of early warning system, allowing him to react accordingly. His spider-sense offers him near complete awareness of his surroundings, and in conjunction with his reflexes, allows him to instinctively dodge or counter nearly all attacks. His spider-sense also helps him recognize other individual with spider-powers, making them have some sort of connection. * '''Skilled combatant''': Peter's abilities overall make him a capable melee fighter, being able to hold his own against Tombstone. He also uses fighting skill in conjunction with his powers, as he easily bested [[Tombstone]] with his fists and web. He appears to also be an accomplished brawler (his fighting style resembles bare-knuckle boxing). === Abilities === * '''Gifted Intellect''': As with most versions of Peter Parker, Peter has shown to have a great intelligence above an ordinary person managing to complete the Rubik's cube he took with him even though he did not know what the colors were == Equipment == ==== Weapons ==== * '''Revolver''' : A gun used by Peter Parker during his days as Spider-Man. === Other Equipment === * '''[[Spider-Man Suit]]''' : Staying true to the stereotypical outfit of his profession, Peter wears an all-black ensemble consisting of a long, flowing coat, knee-length boots, gloves, sunglasses (over his mask), a fedora when he is fighting crime. == Relationships == === Family === * [[Benjamin Parker (Earth-90214)|Ben Parker]] † - Uncle === Allies === * [[Spider-Gang]] - Former Teammates and Friends ** [[Peter Parker (Earth-616)|Peter B. Parker/Spider-Man]] - Alternate Self and Ally ** [[Gwen Stacy (Earth-65)|Gwen Stacy/Spider-Woman]] - Ally ** [[Peni Parker]] - Alternative Self and Ally ** [[Peter Porker|Peter Porker/Spider-Ham]] - Alternate Self and Ally ** [[Pavitr Prabhakar|Pavitr Prabhakar/Spider-Man India]] - Alternate Self ** [[Hobart Brown (Earth-138)|Hobart Brown/Spider-Punk]] ** [[Margo Kess|Margo Kess/Spider-Byte]] - Ally ** [[May Parker (Earth-1610)|May Parker]] - Friend and Ally * [[Miles Morales (Earth-1610)|Miles Morales/Spider-Man]] - Ally === Enemies === * [[Nazis (Earth-90214)|Nazis]] * Alternate Wilson Fisk Henchmen ** [[Wilson Fisk (Earth-1610)|Wilson Fisk/Kingpin]] ** [[Olivia Octavius|Olivia Octavius/Doctor Octopus]] ** [[Maximus Gargan (Earth-1610)|Maximus Gargan/Scorpion]] ** [[Lonnie Lincoln (Earth-1610)|Lonnie Lincoln/Tombstone]] ** [[Aaron Davis (Earth-1610)|Aaron Davis/Prowler]] † ==Gallery== Peter Parker Noir.jpg Peter Parker (Noir).jpg File:Peter Parker (E-90214) 001.png File:Screenshot 2023-04-26 7.11.04 PM.png ==Trivia== * Outside of the Marvel universe, this Spider-Man is also referred to as Spider-Man Noir due to the [[wikipedia:Film noir|"noir"]] setting of his universe. * Unlike his [[w:c:marvel:Peter Parker (Earth-90214)|comic book counterpart]]: ** This Peter and his universe is in black and white in reference to the typical coloring of the movies for the early 1930s. ** The hair of Peter is black instead of brown. ==References== {{DEFAULTSORT:Parker, Peter}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse characters]] [[Category:Male characters]] [[Category:Americans]] [[Category:Heroes]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Spider-Gang Members]] [[Category:Spider-People]] [[Category:Peter Parker]] [[Category:Earth-90214]] [[Category:Fair Skin]]
